_note: Drift v2 perpetuals program (Anchor). Discriminators = sha256('global:<snake_case_name>')[..8], verified against the official Drift IDL from TWO authoritative sources: the on-chain Anchor IDL account (v2.150.0) and github.com/drift-labs/protocol-v2 sdk/src/idl/drift.json (v2.162.0). OrderParams Borsh layout taken verbatim from that IDL's type definition. Program state PDA (findProgramAddress(['drift_state'], program)) confirmed on-chain: 5zpq7DvB6UdFFvpmBPspGPNfUGoBRRCE2HHg5u3gxcsN (owner = the Drift program). See A.6 design notes in POST-MVP-ROADMAP.md for why fixtures are IDL-constructed rather than mainnet-caught (Drift's 2026 order flow is ~100% Swift signed-message orders submitted by keepers; classic outer place/cancel calls are absent from every pagination-reachable window, >6000 tx scanned).

orderParamsLayout._note: Borsh, in declaration order. All fields the parser reads are fixed-size and precede the first Option field (maxTs), so decoding is independent of which trailing options are set — this holds for real on-chain txs too. Offsets below are relative to the OrderParams start (i.e. data offset 8 for place_perp_order/place_and_take_perp_order; data offset 12 for place_orders' first element after the u32 vec length).
orderParamsLayout._trailing: postOnly(u8), bitFlags(u8), maxTs(Option<i64>), triggerPrice(Option<u64>), triggerCondition(u8 enum), oraclePriceOffset(Option<i32>), auctionDuration(Option<u8>), auctionStartPrice(Option<i64>), auctionEndPrice(Option<i64>) — not read by the parser

45a15dca787e4cb9.name: place_perp_order
45a15dca787e4cb9.note: Place a single perp order. args: params(OrderParams) at data offset 8. 3 accounts.

3c3f327b0cc53cbe.name: place_orders
3c3f327b0cc53cbe.note: Place a batch of orders. args: params(Vec<OrderParams>): u32 length at offset 8, first element at offset 12. 3 accounts.

d53301bb6cdce6e0.name: place_and_take_perp_order
d53301bb6cdce6e0.note: Place a perp order and immediately take against the book/AMM. args: params(OrderParams) at offset 8, then successCondition(Option<u32>). 4 accounts — authority moves to index 3 (userStats inserted at 2).

5f81edf00831df84.name: cancel_order
5f81edf00831df84.note: Cancel one order by id. args: orderId(Option<u32>) at offset 8 (1-byte present flag, then u32 if present; None = cancel-by-other-means). 3 accounts.

eee15f9ee36708c2.name: cancel_orders
eee15f9ee36708c2.note: Cancel a filtered set of orders. args at offset 8: marketType(Option<MarketType>), marketIndex(Option<u16>), direction(Option<PositionDirection>). 3 accounts.

f223c68952e1f2b6.name: deposit
f223c68952e1f2b6.note: Deposit collateral into a spot market. args at offset 8: marketIndex(u16), amount(u64), reduceOnly(bool). 7 accounts — authority at index 3. NB: same discriminator as Marinade's deposit (both sha256('global:deposit')); the dispatcher routes by programId so there is no collision.

b712469c946da122.name: withdraw
b712469c946da122.note: Withdraw collateral from a spot market. args at offset 8: marketIndex(u16), amount(u64), reduceOnly(bool). 8 accounts — authority at index 3, driftSigner inserted at 5.
